title: Local Planning

key_provisions.heading: 1.0 White Gum Valley
key_provisions.summary: Figure 2 – Former Kim Beazley School Site

key_provisions.heading: 1 Part C that are varied or replaced by this policy are as follows:
1.1 Street Setbacks
key_provisions.summary: 1.1.1 Dwellings shall be setback from the primary street and secondary street(s)

key_provisions.heading: 1.2 Communal Open Space – Lot 2
key_provisions.summary: 1.2.1 A minimum of 20% of Lot 2 shall be set aside for communal open space

key_provisions.heading: 1.3 Building Priority Zones
key_provisions.summary: 1.3.1 Developments shall provide a contiguous and activated built form frontage
